statement: Broadcom carries a $73 billion AI backlog and targets $100 billion in annual AI chip revenue by 2027, underscoring hyperscaler ASIC demand.
why: A large and growing custom-silicon backlog signals strong committed demand for hyperscaler ASICs that competes with merchant GPUs.

impact.mechanism: Broadcom ASIC backlog reflects hyperscaler demand shifting some AI compute from merchant GPUs to custom silicon.

evidence.source: Tom's Hardware custom AI ASIC state of play
evidence.excerpt: Broadcom alone carries a $73 billion AI backlog and is targeting $100 billion in annual AI chip revenue by 2027.
